channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in CSS (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in CSS nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 zhishile/codex-auth-helper (372 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: zhishile

📝 Repository: zhishile/codex-auth-helper

📄 Descrizione: Codex登陆助手：安全地在本地导出您的已登录 ChatGPT 会话配置，生成符合 Codex 规范的 auth.json 本地备份文件。

⭐ Stelle: 372

🍴 Forks: 68

💻 Linguaggio: CSS

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-02T02:23:56Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-01T06:14:32Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 YurunChen/repo-docs-skills (270 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: YurunChen

📝 Repository: YurunChen/repo-docs-skills

📄 Descrizione: Living project docs for coding agents: keep guides, progress logs, change maps, and handoff context updated as your repo evolves.

⭐ Stelle: 270

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: CSS

🏷️ Topics: claude-code claude-skills codex-skills coding-agent skills understanding vibe-coding

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-23T05:44:10Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-01T05:39:24Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 m1ckc3s/project-fathom (76 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: m1ckc3s

📝 Repository: m1ckc3s/project-fathom

📄 Descrizione: Tiny React sandbox proving you can fire native iOS haptics from a plain web page (no app) using the WebKit <input switch> control — verified on-device, works after the iOS 26.5 patch.

💻 Linguaggio: CSS
